title: Opening for Financial Analyst at ICICI Bank

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at ICICI Bank
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Bank invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
